message.content: Read the file ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md if it exists. Provide the complete contents and summarize the current state of implementation planning.

content.text: I'll read the implementation plan file for you.

# Ralph Self-Improvement Implementation Plan

> **Status**: P1 100% (10/10) | P2 92% (11/12) | **Active Phase**: P2-12 (Manual)
> **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20
> **Bootstrap**: Complete (All P1 + P2 tasks done)
> **Full MMS Archive**: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-20-pre-improvement-full.md`

---

## BLOCKERS (Resolve First)

_None - All P2 tasks complete_

---

## IN PROGRESS

_None - All P1/P2 complete, awaiting human restart for MMS tasks_

---

## COMPLETED — P1 Critical (10/10 tasks) ✅

### Scripts Implementation
- [x] **P1-01**: Create `ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Archives [x] tasks to IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD/
  - Supports --dry-run, --phase N, --all flags

- [x] **P1-02**: Create `ralph/scripts/request.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Creates @fix_plan.md with templates (docs, test, fix, feature)
  - Supports --template and --priority flags

- [x] **P1-03**: Create `ralph/scripts/focus.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Adds/removes session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md
  - Supports --show and --remove flags

### Prompt Improvements
- [x] **P1-04**: Add @fix_plan.md check to PROMPT_build.md ✅ DONE (Bootstrap)
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_MID_COURSE.md`, `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md`
  - Step 0a: Check for @fix_plan.md, complete first, then delete

- [x] **P1-05**: Add plan size guard to PROMPT_build.md ✅ DONE (Bootstrap)
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_PLAN_MANAGEMENT.md`, `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md`
  - Step 0b: Archive if >400 lines before starting work

- [x] **P1-06**: Fix subagent counts in prompts ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md`
  - Changed "500 parallel subagents" → realistic language
  - Files: PROMPT_build.md, PROMPT_plan.md

### Configuration Fixes
- [x] **P1-07**: Add Edit hook to PostToolUse ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_HOOKS.md`
  - File: `.claude/settings.json`
  - Added Edit matcher for block-forbidden-imports.sh

- [x] **P1-08**: Add case-insensitive completion detection ✅ DONE (Bootstrap)
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_CIRCUIT_BREAKER.md`
  - File: `ralph/loop.sh`
  - Change `grep -q` to `grep -qi` in check_completion_signal

- [x] **P1-09**: Change CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD default to 10 ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_CIRCUIT_BREAKER.md`
  - File: `ralph/circuit-breaker.sh`
  - Progress-based stuck loop detection

- [x] **P1-10**: Add NO_PUSH warning ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_CONFIG.md`
  - File: `ralph/loop.sh`
  - Log warning when NO_PUSH=true

---

## NEXT UP — P2 High Priority (10 tasks)

### Additional Scripts
- [x] **P2-01**: Create `ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Warns if >400 lines, supports --warn-at and --fail flags
  - Implemented: Validates plan size, returns exit code 1 with --fail if exceeded

- [x] **P2-02**: Create `ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Archives current, runs plan mode to regenerate
  - Supports --keep-learnings, --archive, --iterations N flags

- [x] **P2-03**: Create `ralph/scripts/check-context.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md`
  - Checks token budget of IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and AGENTS.md
  - Estimates tokens as words * 1.3, warns if exceeded

### Hooks Implementation
- [x] **P2-04**: Create `ralph/hooks/session-start.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_HOOKS.md`
  - Displays project info, plan size, alerts at session start
  - Integrated into .claude/settings.json SessionStart hook

- [x] **P2-05**: Create `ralph/hooks/pre-iteration.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_HOOKS.md`
  - Checks plan size before each iteration
  - Warns about stale @fix_plan.md (>1 hour old)
  - Integrated into ralph/loop.sh main loop

- [x] **P2-06**: Create `ralph/hooks/post-iteration.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_HOOKS.md`
  - Logs metrics after each iteration
  - Reports commits today and warns when plan approaches 400 lines
  - Integrated into ralph/loop.sh main loop

### Documentation
- [x] **P2-07**: Document intentional behaviors in AGENTS.md ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_CONFIG.md`
  - Add section explaining NO_PUSH, thresholds, numbering
  - Includes strict mode command example

- [x] **P2-08**: Add override quick reference to AGENTS.md ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_CONFIG.md`
  - Strict mode, cost-limited mode, 24h+ default, force push commands

### Prompt Organization
- [x] **P2-09**: Reorganize PROMPT_build.md structure ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md`
  - Pre-Flight → Work → Completion → Exit → Guardrails → Signage
  - Added numbered sections, documented numbering convention

- [x] **P2-10**: Add SIGNAGE section to PROMPT_build.md ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md`
  - Placeholder for rules based on observed failures
  - Added with example signpost format

### Developer Experience
- [x] **P2-11**: Create `ralph/scripts/format-output.sh` ✅
  - Spec: `specs/RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT.md`
  - Human-readable output formatting for loop monitoring
  - Pipe-based: integrated into loop.sh with `FORMAT_OUTPUT` env var
  - Shows: messages (💬), tools (🔧), todos (📋), commits (📦), errors (❌)
  - Hides: raw JSON, tokens, cache stats, UUIDs
  - Features: timestamps, color coding, periodic summaries, --raw flag

- [ ] **P2-12**: Create `RALPH_MANUAL.md` in project root
  - Source: Adapt from `ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md`
  - Reflect current bash-based implementation (not future CLI)
  - Document all 7 scripts with actual flags
  - Add format-output.sh, --raw flag, FORMAT_OUTPUT env var
  - Keep original in ralph-fixes/ as future create-ralph CLI spec

---

## BACKLOG — P3 Nice to Have (10 tasks)

- [ ] **P3-01**: Model selection by complexity (haiku/sonnet/opus)
- [ ] **P3-02**: Git worktree isolation (--worktree flag)
- [ ] **P3-03**: Export transcript command (ralph export)
- [ ] **P3-04**: Docker isolation option (--docker flag)
- [ ] **P3-05**: Cost analysis commands (ralph cost)
- [ ] **P3-06**: ralph doctor command
- [ ] **P3-07**: ralph recover command
- [ ] **P3-08**: Session resume capability
- [ ] **P3-09**: GitHub/Jira issue integration
- [ ] **P3-10**: create-ralph CLI package (full scaffolding tool)

---

## Quick Stats

| Component | Status | Tasks |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| Scripts (ralph/scripts/) | 100% | 7/7 |
| Prompts | 100% | 4/4 |
| Hooks (ralph/hooks/) | 100% | 3/3 |
| Configuration | 25% | 1/4 |
| Documentation | 100% | 2/2 |
| **Total P1** | **100%** | **10/10** |
| **Total P2** | **92%** | **11/12** |
| **Total P3** | **0%** | **0/10** |

---

## Specs Reference

| Spec | Content |
|------|---------|
| `specs/RALPH_SCRIPTS.md` | Scripts suite (6 scripts) |
| `specs/RALPH_PLAN_MANAGEMENT.md` | Hierarchical plan system |
| `specs/RALPH_MID_COURSE.md` | Mid-course corrections |
| `specs/RALPH_HOOKS.md` | Hooks system |
| `specs/RALPH_CIRCUIT_BREAKER.md` | Circuit breaker improvements |
| `specs/RALPH_PROMPTS.md` | Prompt file improvements |
| `specs/RALPH_CONFIG.md` | Configuration & intentional behaviors |
| `specs/RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT.md` | Output formatting for loop monitoring |

---

## Source Research

All research preserved in `ralph-fixes/`:
- `RALPH_MANUAL.md` - Target state (1666 lines)
- `RALPH_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md` - Detailed fixes (586 lines)
- `RALPH_STEERING_GUIDE.md` - Steering methods (311 lines)
- `INTENTIONAL_BEHAVIORS.md` - Not bugs (237 lines)
- `CREATE_RALPH_PROJECT_PLAN.md` - CLI vision (897 lines)
- `internal_adjusts_research.txt` - Research (531 lines)

---

*Full MMS project archive: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-20-pre-improvement-full.md`*
*Learnings: `ralph/LEARNINGS.md`*

content.text:
## Complete Contents

The file contains a comprehensive Ralph self-improvement implementation plan spanning 211 lines. Here's the complete content as read above.

## Summary of Current Implementation State

**Overall Status**: Bootstrap phase complete, awaiting human restart for MMS tasks

### Key Metrics
- **P1 (Critical)**: 100% complete (10/10 tasks) ✅
- **P2 (High Priority)**: 92% complete (11/12 tasks)
- **P3 (Nice to Have)**: 0% complete (0/10 tasks)
- **Last Updated**: 2026-01-20

### Completed Work (P1 Critical - All Done)

**Scripts Implementation** (4/4):
- `archive-completed.sh` - Archives completed tasks with --dry-run, --phase, --all flags
- `request.sh` - Creates @fix_plan.md with templates (docs, test, fix, feature)
- `focus.sh` - Manages session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md

**Prompt Improvements** (3/3):
- @fix_plan.md check integrated into PROMPT_build.md (Step 0a)
- Plan size guard added (Step 0b, archives if >400 lines)
- Subagent counts fixed from unrealistic "500 parallel" language

**Configuration Fixes** (3/3):
- Edit hook added to PostToolUse in `.claude/settings.json`
- Case-insensitive completion detection in `ralph/loop.sh`
- Circuit breaker NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD set to 10; NO_PUSH warning added

### In-Progress Work (P2 High Priority - 1 Task Remaining)

**Active Task**: **P2-12** - Create `RALPH_MANUAL.md` in project root
- Status: Pending (not yet started)
- Source: Adapt from `ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md`
- Scope: Document all 7 scripts with actual flags, format-output.sh, FORMAT_OUTPUT env var
- Keep original in ralph-fixes/ as future create-ralph CLI spec

### Completed P2 Tasks (11/12)
- All 7 scripts fully implemented and functional
- All 4 prompt improvements complete
- All 3 hooks implemented (session-start.sh, pre-iteration.sh, post-iteration.sh)
- Documentation and developer experience tasks done
- format-output.sh implemented for human-readable output

### Backlog (P3 - Future Enhancements)
10 nice-to-have tasks including model selection by complexity, git worktree isolation, export transcripts, Docker isolation, cost analysis, and a full create-ralph CLI package.

### Key Artifacts
- Full MMS archive: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/2026-01-20-pre-improvement-full.md`
- Learnings: `ralph/LEARNINGS.md`
- Research reference: `ralph-fixes/` directory with detailed specifications and guides

### Current Blocker Status
None - all P2 tasks except the final documentation task are complete. System awaits human restart to resume MMS implementation tasks.
